hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then grep -rn 'sk-ant-\|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk\|op://\|BEGIN.*PRIVATE' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.json' app/ lib/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCKED: Possible secret detected in staged files' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: Check for hardcoded secrets before git commit

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
